findings.evidence: grep for 'Group|Mul|One|Inv|Monoid|→\*|finalMonoidHom|MonoidHom|AmbientIsotopic' in TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy/Isotopy.lean returns no matches; diff adds only finalHomeomorph_refl (485), finalHomeomorph_trans (560), finalHomeomorph_symm (609).
findings.fix: Rewrite the description to state the actual deliverable (the three finalHomeomorph compatibility lemmas as prerequisite infrastructure for the eventual finalMonoidHom toward GeometricTopology layer 3), or include the group/monoid-hom construction the description promises.
findings.issue: Description claims this PR builds the group of ambient isotopies, the multiplication Φ*Ψ := Ψ.trans Φ, finalMonoidHom : AmbientIsotopy Y →* (Y ≃ₜ Y), and the AmbientIsotopic image characterisation; the diff only adds three finalHomeomorph_{refl,trans,symm} lemmas. The stated roadmap path is for content that isn't present.

summary: The three added lemmas (finalHomeomorph compatibility with refl/trans/symm) are a coherent single topic and a genuine, proximate prerequisite for the ambient-isotopy group / evaluation homomorphism that parallels the layer-3 diffeomorphism group. But the PR description describes a much larger deliverable (a Group instance, multiplication Φ*Ψ, finalMonoidHom, and an AmbientIsotopic image characterisation) that is entirely absent from the diff and the file.
